name: Mozzarella Salad with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Mozzarella cheese, cut into 8 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the romaine lettuce into thin crosswise ribbons.
2. Sprinkle with olive oil and vinegar and toss to coat.
3. Spread the lettuce in an even layer on a serving dish.
4. Arrange the mozzarella slices, slightly overlapping, on top of the lettuce.
5. Cut the sun-dried tomatoes into thin slivers and sprinkle them on top.
6. Top with capers.
7. Add a light dusting of freshly ground black pepper.
